title: CC narrative review S13 panel a1

payload.notes: S13 is the DISCOVERY beat of the B08 inflation-audit centerpiece (S12 false win -> S13 catch -> S14 collapse -> S15 verdict). narrative_beat_fidelity=5: the panel nails its job. Baked terminal shows the exact two-column comparison that makes the catch legible in a single read — the same model output is scored two ways, the apparent +6.2 is decomposed into a real +1.4 plus an inflated +4.8, and the on-panel caption 'sanitizer != external validator' names the exact mechanism of the catch. The reviewer's posture and the highlighted gap make this the moment the inflation is *discovered*, not just stated, so the beat lands without leaking S14's collapse or S15's verdict. composition_story=5: reading order duo -> two-column technical comparison -> the integrity caption is clean and causal; the central chart carries the load-bearing literals (1603 / +6.2 / +1.4 / +4.8 / json_sanitizer / jsonschema.validate) legibly, and the gap is framed as the artifact under audit. NARRATIVE VERDICT: PASS on story — no beat-level rejection; identity-lock / artifact / baked-text quality are deferred to the visual reviewers (Gemini/Codex).
